ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "bust_range" TEXT /* Range of bust measurements for the size */,
  "waist_range" TEXT /* Range of waist measurements for the size */,
  "hips_range" TEXT /* Range of hips measurements for the size */,
  "hand_range" TEXT /* Range of hand measurements for the size */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the size belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the size standard */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the size standard became effective */,
  "retirement_date" TEXT /* Date when the size standard was retired */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size the measurement belongs to */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "hand" REAL /* Hand range measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_length" REAL /* Inseam length measurement in inches */,
  "chest_depth" REAL /* Chest depth measurement in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the region is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size variation */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size with variations */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region with variations */,
  "variation" TEXT /* Description of the size variation */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the size variation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the size variation became effective */,
  "retirement_date" TEXT /* Date when the size variation was retired */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the size variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_variations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the item belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the inventory is located */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the inventory record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the customer (e.g., customer, sales associate, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the customer account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer accessing the sizing information */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sizing information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the customer */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the sizing information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
